articles.title: Santos Reserves Update Highlights Growing Role For Carbon Capture Storage
articles.summary: Santos (ASX:STO) reports a significant improvement in proved plus probable reserves. The company also announces a substantial expansion of its carbon capture and storage resources. articles.summary: What Has Actually Changed In The Santos Story? The latest research tweak on Santos keeps the fair value close to the current A$7.30 price target, shifting only slightly from A$7.38 to A$7.29 while nudging the discount rate higher and leaving revenue growth assumptions almost unchanged. In other words, analysts are adjusting the math around future cash flows without dramatically rethinking how much Santos is worth today.
